Class manager_gui

java.lang.Object
manager_gui
public class manager_gui extends Object
Builds the manager-facing JavaFX screens and helper workflows used to manage inventory, menu items, employees, and reports.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

  • Method Details

    • getSelectedInventoryItem

      public static String getSelectedInventoryItem()
      Returns the currently selected inventory item name.
      Returns:
      the selected inventory item, or an empty string when none is selected

    • getSelectedMenuItem

      public static String getSelectedMenuItem()
      Returns the currently selected menu item name.
      Returns:
      the selected menu item, or an empty string when none is selected

    • getSelectedEmployeeItem

      public static String getSelectedEmployeeItem()
      Returns the currently selected employee name.
      Returns:
      the selected employee, or an empty string when none is selected

    • get_inventory_items

      public static String[] get_inventory_items()
      Loads inventory item names from the database.
      Returns:
      an array of inventory item names
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the inventory query fails

    • get_Menu_items

      public static String[] get_Menu_items()
      Loads menu item names from the database.
      Returns:
      an array of menu item names
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the menu query fails

    • get_Menu_prices

      public static double[] get_Menu_prices()
      Loads menu item prices from the database.
      Returns:
      an array of menu item prices aligned with get_Menu_items()
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the menu query fails

    • get_Employee_items

      public static String[] get_Employee_items()
      Loads employee names from the database.
      Returns:
      an array of employee names
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the employee query fails

    • get_Employee_manager_status

      public static int[] get_Employee_manager_status()
      Loads employee manager flags from the database.
      Returns:
      an array of manager-status flags aligned with get_Employee_items()
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the employee query fails

    • get_inventory_items_levels

      public static int[] get_inventory_items_levels()
      Loads current inventory stock levels from the database.
      Returns:
      an array of stock levels aligned with get_inventory_items()
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the inventory query fails

    • createManagerScene

      public static javafx.scene.Scene createManagerScene(int employeeId)
      Creates the main manager scene for the given employee.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the employee ID displayed in the scene header
      Returns:
      the fully assembled manager scene
